art_market.summary: The art market is seeing a recalibration with a shift away from speculative flipping. Key events include Feng J's high jewelry exhibition at Giverny and the inaugural Modern Craft Market in Pittsburgh.
top_stories: Feng J's high jewelry exhibition at Giverny (March 27 - July 5, 2026).
Market report indicates an end to the speculative frenzy, favoring long-term holding.
Global art market grew to $59.6 billion in 2025, though recent months show cautious confidence.

stock_market.summary: Global markets are facing volatility with tech sectors under pressure due to memory chip selloffs and mixed global cues.
key_factors: Oil prices rebounded (Brent ~$107.78) following rejected peace talks.
Tech selloff in memory chips following Google's 'TurboQuant' research.
Xanadu Quantum Technologies (XNDU) began trading on Nasdaq.
Health In Tech (HIT) announced $7M private placement.
